Metadata.siteTitle: Prompt Market — Premium AI Prompts Marketplace
Metadata.siteDescription: Explore and purchase verified, high-quality ChatGPT, Midjourney, Stable Diffusion, and Claude prompts to maximize your productivity.

cart.title: Shopping Cart
cart.description: Review your selected AI prompts and complete your purchase. Get instant access to prompt content after payment.

login.title: Login
login.description: Sign in to Prompt Market to purchase AI prompts and boost your workflow efficiency.

prompts.title: All Prompt Market
prompts.description: Browse all categories of AI prompts including ChatGPT, Midjourney, Stable Diffusion, and Claude. Find the perfect tool for your needs.

profile.title: Profile Settings
profile.description: Manage your Prompt Market account profile image and nickname.

myPage.title: Purchase History
myPage.description: View your purchased AI prompts and access your complete purchase history.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.description: Securely purchase AI prompts with TossPayments.

Footer.copyright: © {year} Prompt Market. Powered by Google AI Studio.

HeroSection.description: From image and text generation to coding architecture — download expert-verified, high-efficiency prompts instantly and supercharge your workflow.

PromptsPage.title: All Prompt Market
PromptsPage.description: Browse expert-verified prompts for workflow automation, high-quality image generation, architecture planning, and more — all in one place.
PromptsPage.noResults: No prompts match the current filters.
PromptsPage.noResultsHint: Try different keywords or filter tabs.

PromptDetailPage.creator: By {author}
PromptDetailPage.promptUsageHint: * Copy the prompt from the terminal above and paste it into {category} to get started!
PromptDetailPage.locked: 🔒 Purchase to unlock the full prompt text.
PromptDetailPage.digitalDownloadDesc: Unlock the prompt code immediately after payment — accessible here or from your Purchase History.
PromptDetailPage.checkoutDesc: Purchase this prompt and unlock full access.

CartPage.title: Shopping Cart
CartPage.emptyDesc: Browse our best AI prompts and add them to your cart!
CartPage.demoNotice: This is a virtual payment demo. No actual charges will be made.
CartPage.loginRequired: Please log in to complete your purchase.
CartPage.successDesc:
Your order has been confirmed.
Your purchased prompts are now unlocked.
CartPage.testNotice: This is test payment mode. No actual charges will be made. Try the payment safely in the TossPayments sandbox environment.

LoginPage.loginDesc: Sign in to purchase and access your prompts.
LoginPage.signupDesc: Create a new account with your email.
LoginPage.emailSent: A confirmation email has been sent. Please check your inbox.

ProfilePage.title: Profile Settings
ProfilePage.loginRequired: Please log in to view your profile.
ProfilePage.uploadHint:
* Click or drag & drop to upload.
PNG, JPG formats are supported.

MyPage.title: Purchase History
MyPage.loginRequired: Please log in to view your purchase history.
MyPage.emptyDesc: Your purchased prompts will appear here and you can copy them instantly.
MyPage.lifetime: * Prompt Market provides lifetime unlimited access and copy rights for all purchases.

CheckoutPage.title: Checkout
CheckoutPage.widgetLoadError: Failed to load payment widget. Please refresh the page.
CheckoutPage.testModeNotice: This is test payment mode. No actual charges will be made. Try the payment safely in the TossPayments sandbox environment.

CheckoutSuccess.successDesc: Your payment has been successfully approved.
CheckoutSuccess.successUnlocked: Your purchased prompt has been unlocked.
CheckoutSuccess.errorContact: Please try again or contact support.
CheckoutSuccess.unknownError: An error occurred during payment processing.

CheckoutFail.canceledDesc: You have canceled the payment. Please try again or return to your cart.
CheckoutFail.failedDesc: A problem occurred during payment processing.
CheckoutFail.failedContact: Please try again or contact support.
